title: JSON_OBJECT() performs key sort on output
description:
Suggested fix:
JSON_OBJECT function should maintain the column order
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (user_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), dob DATE, email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO users (user_id, name, dob, email) VALUES (1, 'Ganesh', DATE '1980-04-27', 'ganesh@example.com');
SELECT user_id, name, dob, email FROM users WHERE user_id = 1;
SELECT user_id, name, dob, email FROM users WHERE user_id = 1;
SELECT user_id, name, dob FROM (SELECT * FROM users) AS subquery WHERE user_id = 1;
key_bug_features: JSON_OBJECT function key order not preserved
